TestCase z26Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element to rotate
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Operation: rotate subarray (the whole array) right by k positions, where k is random within length
    int k = rand() % follow_case.n;  // k ∈ [0, n-1]
    if (k > 0) {
        // Helper lambda to reverse a segment in‑place
        auto reverse_segment = [&](int start, int end) {
            while (start < end) {
                int tmp = follow_case.a[start];
                follow_case.a[start] = follow_case.a[end];
                follow_case.a[end] = tmp;
                ++start;
                --end;
            }
        };
        // Reverse whole array
        reverse_segment(0, follow_case.n - 1);
        // Reverse first k elements
        reverse_segment(0, k - 1);
        // Reverse remaining elements
        reverse_segment(k, follow_case.n - 1);
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
